image:image.image:title: Home - Visit to Alder Hey
image:image.image:caption: I was delighted to visit Alder Hey as part of its Put Children First campaign, where I got to tour the Innovation Hub, Mental Health Hub and a new state-of-the-art Neonatal Care Unit.
